title: SMALL BUSINESS SUPPORT - 211info
text: WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM SMALL BUSINESS SUPPORT Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides business education and one-on-one counseling and coaching. Topics may include; marketing, setting financial goals, developing business plans using Idea Buddy, business registration, learning about loan opportunities, including Kiva loans. 1136 Paiute Avenue Warm Springs, OR 97761 Eligibility: People who live, work, or have addresses on the Warm Springs Indian Reservation Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-noon and 1pm-5pm Email (541) 553-1348 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 553-1348 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call, or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Photo ID, proof of income, and proof of address AREA SERVED: Warm Springs Indian Reservation Services: Business Development * Native American Community Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY ECONOMIC DEVELOPMENT AND FINANCE - INDIVIDUAL DEVELOPMENT ACCOUNT EMPLOYMENT - WORKFORCE DEVELOPMENT MONEY MANAGEMENT - HUD APPROVED FINANCIAL AND HOMEOWNERSHIP COUNSELING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WARM SPRINGS COMMUNITY ACTION TEAM
